name: Vegetables with Chicken Breast (German)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean broccoli and cauliflower and cut into small pieces.
2. Peel and slice carrots.
3. Bring the vegetable broth to a boil and cook the cauliflower for 5 minutes in it.
4. Add broccoli and carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Strain the vegetables through a colander and keep the broth.
6. Melt butter and stir in flour, stirring until smooth, about 2 minutes.
7. Gradually add hot vegetable broth, cream, salt, pepper, and nutmeg, whisking continuously to ensure a smooth sauce.
8. Heat oil in a large skillet and fry chicken breasts on both sides for about 6 minutes each.
9. Place chicken on paper towels to absorb grease.
10. Arrange chicken on plates and top with vegetables and pour the sauce over the meat.
11. Serve with rice.
